---
title: "Presentations & Briefings"
layout: full
# We use Quarto's built-in listing engine to auto-generate our deck catalog
listing:
  contents: "decks/*.qmd" # Points cleanly into the isolated decks folder
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, subtitle, date]
---

A collection of interactive slide decks mapping socio-technical systems, global value chains, and industry roadmaps. Click any deck below to launch full-screen presentation mode (press **F** for fullscreen, **O** for overview).
